description: Help make informed business decisions by collecting, modeling and visualizing data.
author: Fridah D.
pros: SAP Analytics Cloud automates the entire process of data modeling and visualization at the point of making business decisions.
cons: Everything on SAP Analytics Cloud works perfect for me.

review_title: Powerful and Intuitive Tool for Reporting and Data Visualization
description: SAP Analytics Cloud have helped me in getting a quick grasp on the data with the help of its data visualization and manipulation features , it has provided me a great way to present my finding to the customers and also allowing me to apply ML models for predictive analysis .
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1. Robust and Friendly UI and easy to use 2. Provides with multiple data visualization and data manipulation features 3. Good support for predictive analysis and ML models 4. A cloud platform thus making it ready to use anytime 5.Good documentation provided for usage
cons: 1. More Third Party Integration can be added and data source supports must be added 2. Can be extended to support multiple data sources 3. Calculating and application of formula to data can be made simple

review_title: A lot of promise, little functionality
description: Since we started using SAP Analytics Cloud, the problems increased instead of decreasing. The experience of planning became a nightmare, where we realized that many calculations can not be made or that it is necessary to perform up to 9 calculations to obtain a result that in another tool would be obtained with one and only one calculation. In real time, the planning carried out on an excel sheet ends up being faster and easier to perform than using SAP Analytics Cloud.
author: Ítalo J.
pros: Easy to use Graphics with a striking and modernist aesthetic
cons: Constant server errors Little or no information about the errors The planning model does not allow the entry of data in calculated accounts. Which, forces the user to have "Account Plan" and "Account Import" to formulate "Consolidated Account" as "IF (version = plan, [Account Plan], [Account Import]) .This makes the planning for each account complex calculated and if there is more than one version the problem rises exponentially. Very few formulas to perform calculations Serious performance problems due to the use of Lookup formulas Some complexities must be solved with the use of script, which is not easy to learn for the end user, eliminating all automation options and returning to archaic and manual systems. Each use of srcipt must be executed with a button. However, the waiting time can not exceed 5 minutes. Otherwise, the action is not executed. I had to have 12 buttons to execute a single action.

description: SAC has been a great alternative to traditional dashboarding services and allows our team to manage our data in the cloud and quickly analyze and display trends. Overall, SAC has been an extension of our complex SAP system, but it has been extremely useful in communicating information to key recipients in a actionable way.
author: Austin S.
pros: Because we use SAC for dashboarding and data visualization purposes, I like that I am able to take advantage of the capabilities that cloud services provides while maintaining the SAP data structure. It is also valuable because it allows us to communicate the data from our highest stakeholders to our operators and allows our team view and respond to the information that is given quickly.
cons: There are disadvantages to cloud services and naturally SAC is no exception, also the implementation of the system to integrate with data sources outside of SAP can be complex and require SAP contractors. SAC can also have some bugs since it is relatively new and we have had to pause our system in order to correct these errors in the past.

review_title: Good product, features and reporting are fit for all sector
description: It as allowed us as a company to be better with our procure to pay system. There is nothing SAP cannot do for us.
author: Salami W.
pros: It is now easy for me to create purchase order from outline agreement (me33k)with suppliers and I can also created purchase order manually through me21n
cons: Email approval needs to be incorporated in it. In production, there is no way to get items wise cost.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My opinion ob SAP Analytics Cloud
description: SAP Analytics Cloud is a very advanced tool for business intelligence. It is easy to use ideal for businesses of all sizes.
author: Yasmine N.
pros: SAP Analytics Cloud is an easy to use tool and integrates well with different systems. It allows real-time syncing of data.
cons: The product is very effective in business and customer intelligence. There is nothing to dislike about the software.

review_title: My Experience with SAP Analytics Cloud as a DAC in a Non-profit Sector
author: Linus K.
pros: SAP Analytics Cloud automates data collection, modeling, preparation and visualization from multi-cloud and on-prem data sources into one single integrated repository.
cons: As a daily user of SAC, I lack any aspect that I feel as a drawback on this platform.

description: Excellent cloud tool for native SAP BI and dashboard creation
author: Ilario M.
pros: easy of deployment, Azure and 365 integration
cons: licensing model, sometimes very slow with mobile devices

author: Jonathan L.
pros: SAP Analytics Cloud allows me to save time by automating data modeling, preparation, virtualization and visualization from a wide range of data sources into one single integrated repository.
cons: I can’t complain at the moment since my task as COO in a retail industry has been made easy by SAC for over three years now.

author: Zakaria M.
pros: SAP Analytics Cloud enables me to effectively collect, model and visualize data when making business decisions.
cons: Ever since I started using SAC, I have never come across serious bugs that lasted for long before being fixed.

author: Linet G.
pros: SAP Analytics Cloud makes it a breeze to model and analyze data which help make informed business decisions.
cons: Lack of iOS mobile application is the only issue so far.

review_title: offering real-time analytics and data processing capabilities
description: SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) is a comprehensive business intelligence and data visualization software that integrates planning, predictive analytics, and business intelligence (BI) capabilities.
author: Akash S.
pros: Users can create visually appealing and easy-to-understand reports and dashboards
cons: New users may find the platform challenging to learn initially due to its complexity

review_title: The best option for SAP customers
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: High value for integration with many source systems, especially SAP Source System
cons: The latency in Latam is a huge problem. The planning model for end-user is still so hard to understand
author_profession: Solution Manager: Business Analytics & Agile Coach

description: SAP Analytics Cloud has a wide range of features that can help users to track, analyze, and solve data-related problems on shopfloor. It provides insights into your manufacturing data so you can make better decisions.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The reporting features in SAP Analytics Cloud are amazing. I can create beautiful reports thar are easy to understand and share.
cons: Learning curve could be a potential barrier for inexperienced users.

review_title: I use to used many software products but I have never meet like SAP it is incredible.
description: Before one year I don't know what SAP it is, but after I started to use it I told myself I wish If I know it for a while, SAP really helps me in my responsibilities.
author: fadi H.
pros: The most impact feature of SAP, in my opinion, is you can create your own data and you can analyze it as much as you could also you can track it beside you can just log in from any PC to your own data all you have to do is just to put your login details.
cons: There are some tools that are not worked probably when many users use the SAP from different login PC your data will be hidden and also there is no explanation for many tools at that time. Although SAP is the best in many tools if you do any typing mistakes and you just save your data you can not easily fix it I really suffered from this I hope to improve this side.

description: I used over 6 months SAP analytics in my former company to understand insightful information for the website and channels. It gives you wider glance to understand your marketing strategy.
author: Mert D.
pros: SAP has wonderful informations for analytics and you can use it to drive your marketing strategy. There are lots of modules that you can connect to have better insights for your marketing channels.
cons: There is no way to say that but SAP is expensive. You have to pay for each module that you want to use and it costs you alot. Otherwise, their service is wonderful.

author: Pavithra N.
pros: 1. Very easy to create dashboards and report. 2. Easily Customizable. 3. Easy to learn.
cons: Drill down functionality is not as clear as you would think.

review_title: It's not business-line specific or function-specific. It goes across all business lines
description: The inproved insight into the data means we are able to respond to the rapidly-growing business more effectively
author: Ahmed A.
pros: It pulls data from multiple sources and then blends it to provide nearly live service-level reporting
cons: Took more time to implement and customize than we had thought
author_profession: Master Data Analytics and Insights Analyst

description: If you have a team and big data to deal with, I recommend using it for your business.
author: Shawn M.
pros: Real-time data.Formatted and downloadable with Excel extensions.Cloud-Based Platform.
cons: It a slow little bit recently, and challenging at the beginning but worth it in the end.

description: Its pretty decent. With a few minor tweaks it shld be perfect
author: Sasheena D.
pros: The way you can follow and confirm the completion of each process as well as who completed the process. How secure each user is. No one else has my password so I know for sure my name will not pop up on any transactions I did not complete.
cons: I don't like tht the Enter Key makes my Lines permanent. Most times I have to start over. Would love to get an undo button.

review_title: I used SAP Analytics Cloud to create some commerciale and financial reports.
description: Easy of use; analytics insight; beautiful interface.
author: Damiano M.
pros: The tool has great features like the planning menu and the easy of use interface. It's a complete tool for Business Intelligence and analytics, with beautiful views and charts.
cons: SAP Analytics Cloud doesn't have some features that other BI tool have, for instance direct connectors with cloud data sources as Google Analytics, Facebook, etc. The latency is also a problem for final users.

author: Abel A.
pros: great and easy to use software and allows for quick data entry
cons: the graphic interface needs to be slightly reworked and also the price should be reviewed for small businesses
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: You are able to use SAP Analytics Cloud where ever you are located. It makes it a versatile tool to be able to access remotely.
cons: As with all new software the interface and tools look daunting to begin with. However with time, it all fits together

review_title: SAP Analytics cloud: Real time analytics.
author: Kayla Lyne C.
pros: Excellent cloud analytics with live connections gives instant data fetch. User Interface is very easy to use and very easy to create financial statements.
cons: Expensive software. And setting up for first use is difficult. I would suggest that they should have a better tutorials for beginners.

review_title: All of your data, all in one place
author: Kevin C.
pros: What an amazing tool for anyone running SAP and integrations. I am able to pull my CRM Data and my SAP data cleanly together and report on it with amazing precision. The graphs look fantastic as well! Loads of functions and different ways to show and slice your data.
cons: It is a bit much to setup when dealing with integration points, but show me an Analytics tool that doesn't. Stellar for the price as well.
